title: Dead Space holographic projection cone per AOE ability targeting (hybrid HUD layer)
summary: Decision codified 2026-04-27 (HUD canonical = Tactics Ogre overlay-rich + cherry-pick Dead Space). Render proiezione cono diegetic da caster per AOE ability targeting (in-fiction tooltip pattern). Layer additivo a Tactics Ogre HUD canonical. Stretch goal P1 visualization.
